title: See First
text: Awareness is the first layer of defense.
alt: Uncrewed sensing installation on a coastal ridge at first light

title: Signal Fast
text: The value of detection is measured by how quickly it reaches decision-makers.
alt: Sensor and communications mast lit against a night sky

title: Sustain the Watch
text: Persistent missions require infrastructure, readiness, maintenance, and endurance.
alt: Long-endurance uncrewed aircraft holding station above distant terrain

title: Preserve Authority
text: Hemisphere Defense programs are built around clear authority boundaries. Government mission owners retain command and response authority.
alt: Government mission operators directing a shared awareness picture from a command center

title: Scale Through Evidence
text: Programs should grow through pilots, validation, measurable performance, and disciplined decision gates.
alt: Close engineering detail of modular defense hardware undergoing inspection and test
